channel.title: Bread Lab
channel.description: Home bread baking experiments with a scientific approach

item.title: R1-C1: Rye-wheat bread 60/40
item.description: The first rye-track lesson: a simple 60/40 rye-wheat control loaf on one rye starter, without malt, spices, or scald.
item.dc:creator: Dmitry Platonov
item.content:encoded: The first rye-track lesson: a simple 60/40 rye-wheat control loaf on one rye starter, without malt, spices, or scald.

item.title: S2-C1: Tangzhong white bread
item.description: First soft-wheat lesson: white bread with tangzhong, milk, sugar, butter, cold fermentation, and freshness control.
item.dc:creator: Dmitry Platonov
item.content:encoded: First soft-wheat lesson: white bread with tangzhong, milk, sugar, butter, cold fermentation, and freshness control.

item.title: R1-C2: Dark bread with 80% rye flour
item.description: Rye-track lesson on high-rye bread: dark bread with 80% rye flour, a scald, Brotgewürz, and three-stage rye sourdough refreshment.
item.dc:creator: Dmitry Platonov
item.content:encoded: Rye-track lesson on high-rye bread: dark bread with 80% rye flour, a scald, Brotgewürz, and three-stage rye sourdough refreshment.

item.title: R2-C1: Borodinsky Sourdough Bread
item.description: Advanced regional rye-track lesson: Borodinsky scalded rye on sourdough with coriander, red rye malt, and sweet-sour balance.
item.dc:creator: Dmitry Platonov
item.content:encoded: Advanced regional rye-track lesson: Borodinsky scalded rye on sourdough with coriander, red rye malt, and sweet-sour balance.
